summary: Retested Due Diligence textarea Enter key bug fix. All 3 tests PASSED: Enter creates new line, Space works between words, and empty lines are cleaned up on blur.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Due Diligence textarea Enter key bug is now FIXED. The fix in AdminPage.jsx lines 3001-3014 works correctly: onChange preserves all lines (including empty) during typing, and onBlur filters out empty lines when user leaves the field.

tests_performed.due_diligence_textarea_enter: PASS - 'First item' + Enter + 'Second item' shows on two separate lines
tests_performed.due_diligence_textarea_space: PASS - 'Word one word two word three' typed correctly with spaces
tests_performed.due_diligence_textarea_blur_cleanup: PASS - Empty lines removed on blur (4 lines → 2 lines)

fix_verification.fix_description: onChange handler now maps ALL lines to <li> elements (preserving empty lines during typing). onBlur handler filters out empty lines when user leaves the field. This allows Enter key to create new lines while still cleaning up empty bullet points on save.
